about.description1: A high school student from Guangdong
about.description2: Love tinkering with code, chatting, want to do everything but can't do anything well
about.content:
A student from Guangdong, online name SaltWood_233, you can call me SaltWood!
I like coding, playing games, and listening to music~
I play Azur Lane and similar gacha games, some rhythm games, World of Warships and Minecraft!

tech.description:
SaltWood is pretty free!
If we're on good terms, feel free to ask me tech questions anytime qwq
I can write projects too... just that my school gives too few holidays so I probably won't finish (sad)
Here's what I know (whispers)
